creator: ngie@FreeBSD.org
text:
The attached patch is a culmination of the efforts by jhb@ and Matthias Apitz to fix building open-vm-tools* as some macros were removed/renamed and the vrecycle KPI was changed.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: Check out r234607+ and install it.
cd /usr/ports/emulators/open-vm-tools
make all
